ABOUT.SUBTITLE: I am
ABOUT.INFO_1: I’m passionate about building frontend experiences where design, usability, and performance come together. I enjoy collaborating on ideas and turning them into intuitive, responsive interfaces that feel simple and natural to use.
ABOUT.INFO_2: I see every challenge as an opportunity to learn and refine my approach. I carefully analyze problems, evaluate different solution strategies, and focus on writing clean and efficient code. Through continuous learning and working with modern frontend technologies, I consistently improve my skills. If you value clarity, creativity, and collaboration, I would be happy to work together.

WORK.TITLE: My Work
WORK.TITLE__text-1: Discover my frontend projects and explore interactive experiences brought to life through modern web design.
WORK.TITLE__text-2: experiences brought to life through modern web design.
WORK.PROJECT_1: A Kanban-inspired task manager designed for teamwork, making it easy to collaborate, assign tasks, and track progress through intuitive drag-and-drop interactions.
WORK.PROJECT_2: A fun jump-and-run throwing game built with an object-oriented approach. Help Pepe collect coins, grab Tabasco, and take on the crazy hen.
WORK.PROJECT_3: An interactive Pokémon card powered by an API, designed to quickly explore types, stats, and alternate forms in a smooth, visual way.

FRIENDS.TITLE: Need a teamplayer?
FRIENDS.SUBTITLE: Here what my colleagues said about me
FRIENDS.CARD_1-TEXT: ‘’Serhat impressed me with his friendly manner, strong teamwork, and conscientious way of working. He approaches tasks with care, precision, and dedication, which makes him a dependable contributor in collaborative projects. On top of that, his positive and kind personality makes him a pleasure to work with. I would strongly recommend Serhat to any team looking for a dedicated and dependable developer.‘’

FRIENDS.CARD_2-TEXT: ‘’I had the opportunity to work with Serhat on frontend projects, and he consistently impressed me with his technical expertise and professional attitude. His code is clean, well-organized, and reflects a strong understanding of frontend best practices. Serhat approaches challenges calmly and methodically, communicates openly, and is always willing to collaborate with the team. I would confidently recommend him as a reliable and skilled frontend developer.‘’

FRIENDS.CARD_3-TEXT: ‘’As a team member, Serhat is someone who stands by his commitments and, once he is part of a team, consistently follows the process until the goal is achieved. This approach creates a highly productive atmosphere within the team. As a result, projects are completed more quickly, and finished projects provide valuable learning experiences for everyone involved. I gained these experiences while working with him in the field of software development. ‘’

LEGAL.TITLE: Legal Notice
LEGAL.TEXT_1: Information pursuant to Section 5 of the German Digital Services Act (DDG)
LEGAL.SUBTITLE_2: Consumer Dispute Resolution / Universal Arbitration Board
LEGAL.TEXT_3: We do not participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board and are not obligated to do so.
LEGAL.TEXT_4: The contents of our website have been created with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content. As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with Section 7 (1) DDG and general legislation. Pursuant to Sections 8 to 10 DDG, however, we are not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity. Obligations to remove or block the use of information under general laws remain unaffected. Liability in this respect is only possible from the time we become aware of a specific legal violation. Upon notification of such violations, we will remove the content immediately.
LEGAL.TEXT_5: Our website contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no control. Therefore, we cannot accept any liability for this external content. The respective provider or operator of the linked pages is always responsible for their content. The linked pages were checked for possible legal violations at the time of linking, and no illegal content was identifiable at that time. Permanent monitoring of the content of linked pages is not reasonable without concrete evidence of a violation. If we become aware of any legal infringements, we will remove such links immediately.
LEGAL.TEXT_6: The content and works created by the site operator on these pages are subject to German copyright law. Any reproduction, editing, distribution, or any form of utilization beyond the scope of copyright law requires the prior written consent of the respective author or creator. Downloads and copies of this site are permitted for private, non-commercial use only. Where content on this site was not created by the operator, the copyrights of third parties are respected, and such content is identified accordingly. Should you nevertheless become aware of a copyright infringement, please inform us. Upon notification of any violations, we will remove such content immediately.

PRIVACY.TITLE: Privacy Policy
PRIVACY.TEXT_1: The protection of your personal data is very important to me. I process your personal data exclusively in accordance with the applicable data protection regulations, in particular the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
PRIVACY.TEXT_2: Responsible for data processing on this website:
PRIVACY.SUBTITLE_3: 3. Collection and Processing of Personal Data
PRIVACY.TEXT_3: This website does not collect personal data unless you voluntarily provide it to me, for example by contacting me via the contact form. The following data may be processed:
PRIVACY.TEXT_3-4: These data are used exclusively to respond to your inquiry and are not passed on to third parties.
PRIVACY.TEXT_4: When you contact me via the contact form, your information will be stored for the purpose of processing your request and in case of follow-up questions. This data will not be shared without your consent.
PRIVACY.TEXT_5: The processing of your data is based on Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR (your consent) and Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (performance of pre-contractual measures).
PRIVACY.TEXT_6: Your personal data will only be stored for as long as necessary to process your request and will then be deleted, unless legal retention obligations apply.
PRIVACY.TEXT_7-6: Lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority
PRIVACY.TEXT_8: I use appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against accidental or intentional manipulation, loss, destruction or unauthorized access.
PRIVACY.TEXT_9: This website may contain links to external websites. I am not responsible for the content or privacy practices of these external sites.
